name: cough
title: best herbal teas for cough
description: Lavandula angustifolia tea contains bioactive constituents such as linalool and linalyl acetate, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to soothe and calm the throat and lungs to treat cough ailments. The antispasmodic and expectorant properties of this herbal tea help to relax the airways and promote the removal of mucus, providing relief from coughing and congestion.
